signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Sportswear declined in the quarter, driven by a near 40% reduction in our classic footwear franchises... traffic remains challenged.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Gross margins declined 440 basis points to 40.3% on a reported basis due to higher wholesale discounts, higher discounts in our NIKE Factory Stores, supply chain cost deleverage and channel mix headwinds.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We will continue navigating through several factors that create uncertainty in this operating environment, including for the consumer... we're going to take it 90 days at a time because we believe full recovery will take time.
